sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 15:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 15:1
items.html: Bohu is another name for Arich Anpin. It is parallel to Tohu, which is an appellation for Atik, which means negation of attainment, whereas Bohu designates attainment and existence. It is an acronym of Bo Hu [In Him]. (Part 3, Chapter 6, item 3)
